homePage.title: Home
homePage.emptyHome: Posts from people you follow will show up here.
homePage.emptyLocal: No posts yet. Be the first to post something!
homePage.emptyList: Posts from this list's members will show up here.

noteDetailPage.title: Post
noteDetailPage.threadPlaceholder: Reply and quote thread view is coming soon.
noteDetailPage.noReactions: No reactions on this post yet.

noteCard.originalLinkTitle: This post is a duplicate delivered via a bridge/federation. Go to the original post.
noteCard.unavailableRepost: This post can't be shown (it's private).

deleteConfirmModal.title: Delete this post?
deleteConfirmModal.body: This can't be undone. Deleting will also remove the post from federated servers and Bluesky.

postComposer.bskyPrivateConflict: You can't select Private while Bsky delivery is on. Turn off Bsky delivery to change it.
postComposer.bskyVisibilityConflict: Bsky delivery is only available for posts other than Private. Change the visibility to enable it.
postComposer.attachTitle: Attach an image, video, or audio file
postComposer.replyToSameNetwork: Replying on the original post's network
postComposer.forcedPrivateNote: 🔒️ This reply will also be private because it's replying to a private post
postComposer.overLimitDefault: This exceeds Bluesky's character limit. Turn off Bsky to post anyway.

reactionChips.clickToAdd: Click to add the same reaction
reactionChips.customEmojiBlocked: You can't add this custom emoji reaction — it's not registered on this server
